title: IoT-Driven Worker Well-Being Measurement in Industry 5.0: A Systematic Review and Framework - Supplementary Technical Documentation
author: Wyffels, Mathis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains supplementary technical documentation accompanying the research paper  “IoT-Driven Worker Well-Being Measurement in Industry 5.0: A Systematic Review and Framework.”  The repository documents the systematic literature review and framework development process through three complementary documents. 
  Document 1 – Article Screening  provides an overview of the study selection process, including the inclusion and exclusion decisions applied to each screened article. 
  Document 2 – Data Collection and Analysis  contains the extracted data from the selected studies, together with the analyses performed to develop the framework and derive the reported findings. 
  Document 3 – Technical Report  offers a detailed description of the methodology, including the article selection procedure, data extraction process, framework development steps, and categorization decisions. 
 Together, these documents provide transparency, traceability, and reproducibility for the systematic literature review and framework presented in the associated research paper.

  Document 3 – Technical Report  offers a detailed description of the methodology, including the article selection procedure, data extraction process, framework development steps, and categorization decisions.
